title: 指定したthisで会員ラベルを作る

input.factory: () => ({ member: { name: "Mina", rank: "gold" }, prefix: "member:", suffix: "!", makeLabel: function(prefix, suffix) { return prefix + this.name + "(" + this.rank + ")" + suffix; } })
() => ({ member: { name: "Leo", rank: "silver" }, prefix: "[", suffix: "]", makeLabel: function(prefix, suffix) { return this.rank + ":" + prefix + this.name + suffix; } })
() => ({ member: { name: "Nia", rank: "trial" }, prefix: "", suffix: " user", makeLabel: function(prefix, suffix) { return prefix + this.name + " / " + this.rank + suffix; } })
() => ({ member: { name: "Aki", rank: "bronze" }, prefix: "rank=", suffix: "", makeLabel: function(prefix, suffix) { return prefix + this.rank + ", name=" + this.name + suffix; } })
